content:
MODULE: cosmos.health.providers.base
FILE: cosmos/health/providers/base.py (592 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Health Provider Base Classes

Abstract base class for health data providers, extending BioInterfaceProvider
with OAuth support, historical data fetching, and real-time streaming.

CLASSES:
- OAuthCredentials: OAuth credentials for health provider authentication.
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- ProviderStatus: Status information for a health provider.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HealthProvider(BioInterfaceProvider): Abstract base class for health data providers.

Extends BioInterfaceProvider wit
  Methods: def supported_metrics(self) -> List[MetricType]
  Methods: def requires_oauth(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def get_stream(self) -> AsyncIterator[BioDataPacket]
  Methods: def health_check(self) -> bool
  Methods: def get_auth_url(self, redirect_uri: str, state: str='') -> str
  Methods: async def exchange_code(self, code: str, redirect_uri: str) -> bool
- HealthProviderManager: Manages multiple health providers and aggregates data.

Handles:
- Provider regi
  Methods: def register_provider(self, provider: HealthProvider)
  Methods: def unregister_provider(self, name: str)
  Methods: def add_subscriber(self, callback: callable)
  Methods: async def connect_all(self) -> Dict[str, bool]
  Methods: async def disconnect_all(self)
  Methods: async def start_streaming(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, dict]
  Methods: def get_supported_metrics(self) -> List[MetricType]
